programa: Programa 31: La Literatura y Las Bellas Artes

cardio.clue_en: Written works, especially those considered of superior or lasting artistic merit.
A written or printed work consisting of pages glued or sewn together.
A piece of written art like a novel or collection of poems.
A writer of a book, article, or report.
A person who tells a story, especially in a book or play.
A person in a novel, play, or movie.
The leading character or one of the major characters in a drama, movie, novel.
The creation or construction of a fictional character.
The main events of a play, novel, movie, or similar work.
The narrator's position in relation to the story being told.
A fictitious prose narrative of book length.
A story with a fully developed theme but significantly shorter than a novel.
Literary work in which special intensity is given to the expression of feelings and ideas.
A piece of writing that partakes of the nature of both speech and song.
A single line of a poem.

El término general para la poesía, las novelas y los cuentos.
El objeto físico o digital que tiene muchas páginas para leer.
El trabajo escrito por un autor.
La persona que escribe libros profesionalmente.
La voz que cuenta la historia a los lectores.
El héroe, el villano o cualquier persona inventada en el libro.
El personaje número uno y más importante de la historia.
El desarrollo de la personalidad y motivación de los personajes.
Los problemas y la secuencia de eventos de un cuento (plot).
Mirar el mundo desde la mente o experiencia de una persona.

cardio.clue_en: Categories of literature (e.g., poetry, drama, fiction).
A dramatic work for the stage or to be broadcast.
Fiction based on imagined future scientific or technological advances.
An account of a person's life written by that person.
Books and stories written specifically for children or young adults.
A novel focusing on the romantic love between two people.
Judged over a period of time to be of the highest quality and outstanding of its kind.
Of or concerning past events.
A genre intending to or having the capacity to frighten, scare, or disgust.
Relating to the police or detectives; crime fiction.
Intended to teach, particularly in having moral instruction as an ulterior motive.
Causing lighthearted laughter and amusement.
Causing or characterized by extreme distress or sorrow.
Containing or using satire (sarcasm to show stupidity).
To be about or deal with a specific topic.

cardio.clue_en: The expression or application of human creative skill and imagination.
Creative art, especially visual art, whose products are to be appreciated primarily or solely for their imaginative, aesthetic, or intellectual content.
A creation, such as a painting, sculpture, or poem, created with aesthetic intent.
A painting or drawing.
A colored substance spread over a surface, or the resulting piece of art.
The art of making two- or three-dimensional representative or abstract forms.
A portrait of an artist produced or created by that artist.
A painting or drawing of an arrangement of objects, typically including fruit and flowers.
Artists' paint made with a water-soluble binder, or a painting made with it.
The art of painting with oil colors.
Strong, coarse unbleached cloth used as a surface for oil painting.
A brush for applying paint.
A person who produces paintings or drawings as a profession or hobby.
A worker in a skilled trade, especially one that involves making things by hand.
An artist who makes sculptures.

El objeto final creado por un artista.
El arte físico que tiene marco y cuelgas en tu casa.
El líquido de colores, o la obra final.

Pintura de frutas, flores o botellas en una mesa.

cardio.clue_en: To plan and make decisions about something that is being built or created.
To embody or represent something in a faithful or appropriate way.
Art that does not attempt to represent external reality, but seeks to achieve its effect using shapes, forms, colors, and textures.
Belonging to or occurring in the present.
Causing anxiety or uneasiness.
Arousing one's curiosity or interest; fascinating.
Attracting attention by reason of being unusual, extreme, or prominent.
Full of or shedding light; bright or shining, especially in the dark.
Representing familiar things in a way that is accurate or true to life.
Done or made imitating a particular artist or era.
Showing aesthetic elegance and sophistication.
Showing a lack of aesthetic elegance or being offensive.
Tendencies or styles in art with a specific common philosophy or goal.
A group of people working together to advance their shared political, social, or artistic ideas.
An early 20th-century style and movement in art, especially painting, in which perspective with a single viewpoint was abandoned and use was made of simple geometric shapes.

cardio.clue_es: Estilo que busca expresar la experiencia emocional más que la realidad física.

Adjetivo para arte que usa manchas y colores sin formar caras o cosas obvias.
